description: Python script that depends on PyYAML 5.3 but only uses the json standard library module. PyYAML is never imported or called, so its vulnerabilities are not reachable.

findings.human_justification: PyYAML is listed as a dependency but is never imported in the source code. The vulnerable yaml.load() function is not called.
PyYAML is listed as a dependency but is never imported in the source code. No yaml functions are called.
